description_long: This is a modern entertainment cabinet made primarily of dark wood, featuring a flat-screen television on top. The cabinet has a rectangular shape with a smooth, wood-textured finish and includes multiple compartments: a large blue drawer on the left, an open shelf with books or cases, and additional open cubbies for storage. The television is thin and supported by a central stand, with visible ports and ventilation on the back. The front of the cabinet displays a video game screen, suggesting its use as a media or gaming center. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for living rooms, lounges, or recreational urban spaces.
description: A dark wood entertainment cabinet with a flat-screen TV, storage compartments, and a blue drawer, designed for media or gaming use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the TV and the depth of the cabinet, with wood grain visible on the side.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the TV screen, blue drawer, open shelves, and visible contents such as books or cases.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the TV's slimness and the wood texture of the cabinet's side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the TV with ports and ventilation, and the full width of the cabinet's wooden back panel.
